Prized by trophy fishermen, '''guda fish''' were the largest [[Fish/Legends|fish]] found in the icy oceans of [[Neftali/Legends|Neftali]]. They could grow three [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, but were very thin, providing little (but succulent) meat.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]''
